languages.text: {n}Ваша собеседница внимательно смотрит на вас — ее глаза опухли от слез, но взгляд все еще цепок и внимателен.{/n} "Вы не врете, ведь так? Не стали бы врать". {n}Автопистолет из ее рук с грохотом падает на пол.{/n}

{n}Your interlocutor looks at you intently — her eyes are swollen from crying, but her gaze remains steely and focused.{/n} "You're not lying, are you? You wouldn't lie." {n}The autopistol falls from her hands to the deck with a clatter.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваша собеседница внимательно смотрит на вас — ее глаза опухли от слез, но взгляд все еще цепок и внимателен.{/n} "Вы не врете, ведь так? Не стали бы врать". {n}Автопистолет из ее рук с грохотом падает на пол.{/n}

languages.text: {n}相手は真剣な眼差しでこちらを見つめている。涙で腫れた眼だが、その視線は鋭く、ぶれない。 「嘘じゃないよね？嘘は言わないよね？」 銃は彼女の手に握れず、床に転がり落ちた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor looks at you intently — her eyes are swollen from crying, but her gaze remains steely and focused.{/n} "You're not lying, are you? You wouldn't lie." {n}The pistol falls from her hands to the deck with a clatter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 相手は真剣な眼差しでこちらを見つめている。涙で腫れた眼だが、その視線は鋭く、ぶれない。 「嘘じゃないよね？嘘は言わないよね？」 銃は彼女の手に握れず、床に転がり落ちた。

languages.text: {n}Muhatabın sana dikkatle bakıyor. Gözleri ağlamaktan şişmiş olsa da bakışları çelik gibi ve odaklanmış.{/n} "Yalan söylemiyorsunuz, değil mi? Yalan söylemezsiniz." {n}Ellerinden güverteye düşen ototabanca, şıngırtı çıkarıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor looks at you intently — her eyes are swollen from crying, but her gaze remains steely and focused.{/n} "You're not lying, are you? You wouldn't lie." {n}The autopistol falls from her hands to the deck with a clatter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhatabın sana dikkatle bakıyor. Gözleri ağlamaktan şişmiş olsa da bakışları çelik gibi ve odaklanmış.{/n} "Yalan söylemiyorsunuz, değil mi? Yalan söylemezsiniz." {n}Ellerinden güverteye düşen ototabanca, şıngırtı çıkarıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu interlocutora te observa con intensidad: tiene los ojos hinchados de llorar, pero su mirada férrea está totalmente concentrada.{/n} «No está mintiendo, ¿verdad?». {n}La pistola automática cae a la cubierta con estrépito.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor looks at you intently — her eyes are swollen from crying, but her gaze remains steely and focused.{/n} "You're not lying, are you? You wouldn't lie." {n}The autopistol falls from her hands to the deck with a clatter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu interlocutora te observa con intensidad: tiene los ojos hinchados de llorar, pero su mirada férrea está totalmente concentrada.{/n} «No está mintiendo, ¿verdad?». {n}La pistola automática cae a la cubierta con estrépito.{/n}

languages.text: {n}和你对话的人紧盯着你。她双眼虽已哭肿，但目光却仍如钢铁般坚定专注。{/n}“您没有骗人吧？我知道，您不会撒谎的。”{n}当啷一声，自动手枪从她手里滑落，摔在地上。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor looks at you intently — her eyes are swollen from crying, but her gaze remains steely and focused.{/n} "You're not lying, are you? You wouldn't lie." {n}The autopistol falls from her hands to the deck with a clatter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}和你对话的人紧盯着你。她双眼虽已哭肿，但目光却仍如钢铁般坚定专注。{/n}“您没有骗人吧？我知道，您不会撒谎的。”{n}当啷一声，自动手枪从她手里滑落，摔在地上。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre interlocutrice vous observe attentivement. Ses yeux sont gonflés à force de pleurer, mais son regard reste froid et concentré.{/n} « Vous n'essayez pas de me duper, si ? Non, vous ne mentiriez pas. » {n}Elle lâche le pistolet-mitrailleur, qui heurte le pont avec fracas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor looks at you intently — her eyes are swollen from crying, but her gaze remains steely and focused.{/n} "You're not lying, are you? You wouldn't lie." {n}The autopistol falls from her hands to the deck with a clatter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre interlocutrice vous observe attentivement. Ses yeux sont gonflés à force de pleurer, mais son regard reste froid et concentré.{/n} « Vous n'essayez pas de me duper, si ? Non, vous ne mentiriez pas. » {n}Elle lâche le pistolet-mitrailleur, qui heurte le pont avec fracas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Gesprächspartnerin sieht dich konzentriert an – ihre Augen sind geschwollen vom Weinen, aber ihr Blick ist nach wie vor stählern und fokussiert.{/n} "Ihr lügt nicht, oder? Ihr würdet nicht lügen." {n}Die Maschinenpistole rutscht aus ihrer Hand und fällt klappernd auf das Deck.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor looks at you intently — her eyes are swollen from crying, but her gaze remains steely and focused.{/n} "You're not lying, are you? You wouldn't lie." {n}The autopistol falls from her hands to the deck with a clatter.{/n}
